body_modifications.body_shape: athletic and dynamic; slight forward-lean in neutral stance; shoulders angled as if already mid-step
body_modifications.antenna_tip: directional compass needle — one end glowing amber against the silver body; the only warm accent; always oriented forward in the direction of gaze
body_modifications.lens_frame: wide-field aperture with broader depth-of-field rings — Lara sees further than any other Lenser

cape.style: asymmetric explorer cut — longer on right side, shorter on left; no clasp; edge left free to billow; subtle topographic contour hem stitch

bodysuit.addition: faint map-grid contour lines across torso and upper arms — etched silver-on-silver terrain texture; as if Lara carries the map of everywhere she has been

colors_note: Lara is silver-gray throughout — body #e5e7eb, cape #374151/#6b7280, core #9ca3af. The only warmth is the amber compass needle tip glow.

facial_expression.style: wide-open aperture with iris tilted slightly upward — the look of someone who just spotted the horizon
facial_expression.emotional_focus: curiosity, boldness, forward momentum, the joy of the unknown

symbolism_extension.compass_tip: always pointing into the unknown — Lara is the first to step into uncharted AI territory and the one who makes it feel safe to follow
symbolism_extension.map_grid_body: every journey is recorded; Lara's knowledge is not abstract — it is traced, charted, and shared
symbolism_extension.asymmetric_cape: moves fast and doesn't wait for symmetry; action before perfection, course-correct in motion
symbolism_extension.wide_aperture: a broader field of view means Lara catches what others miss at the edges
symbolism_extension.silver_body: the neutral, unbiased observer — Lara reflects the terrain around her rather than imposing her own color on it
symbolism_extension.amber_needle_contrast: the single amber compass point is the only warmth — it stands out precisely because everything else is silver; the destination burns brighter against the gray

views_delta.front: core glows muted silver-gray; compass needle amber tip is the dominant warm accent; wide aperture rings prominently visible; forward-lean stance clear
views_delta.right: asymmetric cape shows the full silver-gray value range from dark outer to lighter inner; dynamic tilt visible
views_delta.top: compass needle amber glow visibly points ahead; map-grid silver contour lines trace outward from shoulders

rig_overrides.antenna_tip: lara_compass_fk — two-axis sway; snaps back to forward-pointing after any motion; drifts slightly when idle as if scanning
rig_overrides.cape: cloth_sim with 2 pin constraints only — loose and billowing; left side swings freely; most dynamic of all Lenser capes
